name: Spikes Everywhere Game
description: Welcome to Spikes Everywhere Game, an intense arcade survival challenge where danger comes from every direction. Your mission is to dodge deadly spikes, survive as long as possible, and test your reflexes in a fast-paced environment filled with obstacles. This addictive reflex game combines quick reactions, precision movement, and increasing difficulty to create an exciting gameplay experience. One wrong move can end your run, so stay alert and move carefully to survive.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
